title: Baccharoides ringoetii
intro: Baccharoides ringoetii, also known as Rangoon gaertner, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, with reported health benefits including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities, which may aid in the treatment of various infections and skin conditions. Bioactive constituents of Baccharoides ringoetii include sesquiterpenoids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. In traditional medicine, Baccharoides ringoetii is commonly used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, as well as being incorporated into topical creams and ointments for skin conditions.
